text: I love planning trips. Last year, I spent weeks researching and booking flights for a two-week trip to Japan. Experiencing a new culture was incredible—from the quiet temples to the busy city streets. The food was a highlight: I tried fresh sushi, warm ramen, and sweet mochi. However, language barriers made simple tasks tricky. Ordering food or asking for directions often required hand gestures and patience. Despite the challenges, those memories remain the most valuable. Each trip teaches me more about the world and myself, and the happiness of exploring unknown places is unforgettable.
